title: Web Checkup
instructions: Review the revised page checklist, record what still needs attention, and finalize the review when every section has been checked.
scenario: A learner revised a simple class landing page. Use the checklist below to confirm the page structure, visual styling, and button behavior still meet course expectations.

html_checks.label: Use one clear page heading and keep section headings in order.
Add descriptive alt text for the hero image.

css_checks.label: Keep spacing consistent across the hero, features, and footer.
Maintain readable text contrast on every card and button.

js_checks.label: Disable the form submit button until required fields are complete.
Show a visible confirmation message after the demo form submits.
